promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next strong sims intake batch after the Axis4 directional evidence-isolation reduction and as the next raw-order precursor bundle in the sims lane.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates precursor-bundle packaging, per-subpayload evidence hashing, a shift toward standalone descendants, family-specific descendant drift, duplicate Stage16 residue, and explicit adjacent-engine32 exclusion.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The sims evidence-boundary batch was used for the nearest hash-transport contract, the Axis4 directional evidence-isolation batch was used for producer/container separation and provenance suspension, and the engine32 family batch was used for the nearest adjacent-family exclusion anchor.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred to the next bounded step because the parent batch explicitly frames engine32 as the adjacent excluded family and natural next raw-order source.
Not selected because this thread prefers existing intake artifacts over fresh raw-source rereads unless a parent batch proves insufficient.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent batch_v3 precursor bundle plus the existing sims evidence-boundary, Axis4 directional evidence-isolation, and engine32 family anchors were sufficient to isolate the reusable lineage, hashing, descendant drift, duplicate residue, and adjacency packets for this pass.

candidate_items.name: BATCH_V3_COMPOSITE_PRECURSOR_NONAUTHORITY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves batch_v3 as precursor packaging rather than a current unified evidence family.

candidate_items.name: PER_SUBPAYLOAD_HASH_OVER_AGGREGATE_CONTAINER_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's clearest provenance rule: aggregate container and evidence-cited payload hashes must not be collapsed together.

candidate_items.name: BUNDLE_LOCAL_IDS_TO_STANDALONE_DESCENDANT_EVIDENCE_SHIFT_PACKET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the current repo-local shift from bundle-local V3/V1 IDs toward later standalone descendant evidence surfaces.

candidate_items.name: DESCENDANT_DRIFT_IS_FAMILY_SPECIFIC_NOT_ONE_TO_ONE_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's strongest anti-flattening lineage packet across Axis12, Axis0, Stage16, and Negctrl descendants.

candidate_items.name: STAGE16_DUPLICATE_LABEL_SAME_BYTES_RESIDUE_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves one sharp duplicate-descendant residue packet instead of silently normalizing it away.

candidate_items.name: ADJACENT_ENGINE32_SEPARATION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves explicit family separation between the precursor bundle and the adjacent focused engine32 suite.

quarantined_items.name: CATALOG_OTHER_PLACEMENT_AS_SUBJECT_MATTER_LOCATION_OR_AUTHORITY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Catalog placement in OTHER does not settle subject-matter location or authority for the embedded branches.

quarantined_items.name: AGGREGATE_RESULTS_BATCH_V3_HASH_AS_EVIDENCE_CITED_OUTPUT_HASH
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly separates the aggregate container hash from the four evidence-cited embedded payload hashes.

quarantined_items.name: LATER_STANDALONE_DESCENDANTS_AS_EXACT_RENAMES_OF_BUNDLE_PAYLOADS
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The descendant families drift by schema and revision rather than following one exact rename path.

quarantined_items.name: NEGCTRL_V2_AND_V3_AS_INTERCHANGEABLE_BECAUSE_MEANS_MATCH
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Matching means do not erase the trial-count revision and provenance drift between the two stored Negctrl descendants.

quarantined_items.name: ENGINE32_MERGED_INTO_BATCH_V3_DUE_SHARED_AXIS_VOCABULARY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Shared axis vocabulary and raw adjacency are not enough to erase the structural family boundary.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the parent batch's strongest reusable lineage and packaging signals: precursor-bundle nonauthority, per-payload evidence hashing, descendant supersession, uneven family drift, duplicate-label residue, and adjacent-family separation.
They preserve batch_v3 as historical precursor structure without letting catalog placement, aggregate hashes, or descendant naming drift self-authorize a clean current evidence story.
They remain small, contradiction-preserving, and proposal-side for later sims lineage synthesis.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain catalog overreads, provenance overreads, rename overreads, or family-boundary overreads rather than clean reusable A2-2 surfaces.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into current law.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after prior required control-surface reads.
Used the sims evidence-boundary, Axis4 directional evidence-isolation, and engine32 family batches as comparison anchors.
No raw core-doc reread was needed for this bounded batch_v3 precursor-lineage reduction pass.
